meaning: n.基础,根本,建立,创立,地基,基金,基金会
examples: Best friends are the foundation of my life.
He laid the foundation of Japan's modern economy.
Mr. HOFFMAN: (As Jon Savage) A friend of mine does some consulting for the Guggenheim Foundation.
Mollyann Brody is Vice President for Public Opinion and Media Research for the Kaiser Family Foundation.
